name: Find The Flaw
short_description: Find The Flaw redefines the traditional spot-the-differences genre with a fresh, polished approach. Experience nice 3D isometric environments, accompanied by meticulously crafted ambient music.
detailed_description:
"Find The Flaw" redefines the traditional spot-the-differences genre with a fresh, polished approach.

Experience nice 3D isometric environments, accompanied by meticulously crafted ambient music. Engage in an unhurried search for cleverly concealed discrepancies, transforming a timeless game concept into something new and exciting!

Dive into the meticulously designed Find The Flaw worlds, where each scene is a masterpiece of detail. Relax within the tranquil soundscapes of the game's music as you challenge your mind with intricate puzzles.

Studies suggest that playing these games can enhance your focus and boost your short-term memory, offering both entertainment and cognitive benefits.

Hi there, Frank Eno here. I have been creating escape room and puzzle games since 2020 under the name of XSGames, doing everything myself: code, graphics, music, design, concept, etc.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian
